'''Dorlon II''' was a barren [[Planet/Legends|planet]] near [[Carida/Legends|Carida]]. It was an extremely [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] world covered in [[Sulfur/Legends|sulfur]], ash, and lava. From space it had the look of a colorful mosaic of black, tan, yellow.

It had an [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] transfer station that was a stop for [[Haj Shipping Lines]] liners and [[Starship/Legends|ships]] to and from Carida.

Many beings on the station board [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] bound for larger ships. [[Kyle Katarn]], leaving the [[Carida Academy/Legends|Academy of Carida]], came to the station, from which a well-appointed shuttle transported him to the ''[[Star of Empire]]''.
